title: freziera oxapampensis
intro: Freziera oxapampensis, also known as the Oxapampa tree, is a plant species native to the cloud forests of Peru. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Freziera oxapampensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Freziera oxapampensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
